news.headline: Live: Trump threatens to strike Iran’s power plants if Strait of Hormuz not opened within 48 hours

news.headline: Can China massively reduce food imports with super-efficient unmanned rice farms?
news.summary:

news.headline: China bosses use smart seats, Wi-fi to track staff activities, leads to anti-monitoring gadgets
news.summary:
In some Chinese workplaces, employers use office Wi-fi, surveillance cameras and even smart seats to monitor what staff do, say and search online.
